title: halimus pedunculatus
intro: Halmus pedunculatus, also known as the Scotch Lovage or Scottish Lovage, is a perennial plant belonging to the parsley family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Halmus pedunculatus include treating digestive issues, such as bloating and indigestion, as well as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
